title: Tap the 'Waist to Height Ratio' title
test_steps: Step 1: Tap the 'Waist to Height Ratio' title

title: Enter '26' into the age field
test_steps: Step 1: Enter '26' into the age field
expected_result: '26' remains visible in the age field

title: Enter '-1' into the age field
test_steps: Step 1: Enter '-1' into the age field
expected_result: The age field displays an error message

title: Select 'CM' in the units selection button
expected_result: 'CM' is selected in the units selection button

title: Enter '6' into the waist field
test_steps: Step 1: Enter '6' into the waist field
expected_result: '6 cm' remains visible in the waist field

title: Enter '-1' into the waist field
test_steps: Step 1: Enter '-1' into the waist field
expected_result: The waist field displays an error message

title: Enter '6' into the height field
test_steps: Step 1: Enter '6' into the height field
expected_result: '6 cm' remains visible in the height field

title: Enter '-1' into the height field
test_steps: Step 1: Enter '-1' into the height field
expected_result: The height field displays an error message

title: Verify the font size and typeface of the title
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the title 'Waist to Height Ratio' is centered, 24sp, bold, sans-serif
expected_result: The title is centered, 24sp, bold, sans-serif

title: Verify the font size and typeface of the input fields
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the age field is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, Step 2: Verify the waist field is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, Step 3: Verify the height field is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif
expected_result: The age field is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, The waist field is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, The height field is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif

title: Verify the font size and typeface of the units selection button
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the units selection button 'CM | KG' is right-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif
expected_result: The units selection button 'CM | KG' is right-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif

title: Verify the font size and typeface of the result section
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the waist-to-height ratio is centered, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, Step 2: Verify the ideal waist is centered, 16sp, regular, sans-serif
expected_result: The waist-to-height ratio is centered, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, The ideal waist is centered, 16sp, regular, sans-serif

title: Verify the font size and typeface of the list row
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the list row 'UnderWeight' is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, Step 2: Verify the list row 'Normal' is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, Step 3: Verify the list row 'OverWeight' is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, Step 4: Verify the list row 'Obese' is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, Step 5: Verify the list row 'Morbidly Obese' is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif
expected_result: The list row 'UnderWeight' is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, The list row 'Normal' is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, The list row 'OverWeight' is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, The list row 'Obese' is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, The list row 'Morbidly Obese' is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif

title: Verify the background colors
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the app bar background is light teal, Step 2: Verify the main content area background is white, Step 3: Verify the footer background is black
expected_result: The app bar background is light teal, The main content area background is white, The footer background is black

title: Verify the touch target size of the 'Calculate' button
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the 'Calculate' button is at least 44x44px

title: Verify the touch target size of the units selection button
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the units selection button 'CM | KG' is at least 44x44px
expected_result: The units selection button 'CM | KG' is at least 44x44px
